text: Great idea to bring education into schools, it is much needed! xx
Girls need to understand it’s not embarrassing to talk about your periods too. Awareness on what is not normal is needed. I put up with this for too long before finding out I had endometriosis.

women's health has a long way to go before it's really truly in hand. I'm stage 4 fibrotic endometriosis. as a kid I had to go home on the first day of my period. as I got older I would have an episode every few months where I'd be vomiting then.pass out. I think maybe I had endo for the whole time
